text.message: Wow, three times in a row?!
oh, I assumed I was getting stolen from again
No Patrick will take from me because he’s going to Patrick
I’m last place in everything and didn’t go after him
So of course he takes from me
This is why John and Chris win patrick
Do I need to embargo you for offering too many trades??
John encouraged it, as of course it's to his advantage
but we shouldn't abide this behavior regardless
we are embargoed so I can't trade with you even if I wanted to
Pay attention to Big City John
Chris is sitting on a monopoly btw
so dont hold too many of the same cards
6 point garvey over there with the largest army...
I at least am being honest with my points
I'll do it for 3 sheep I guess
anyone have wheat or sheep to trade?
too many sevens for me to have a chance of winning
It’s beyond farce at this point with the 3s
concur, but at least it's slowing you down...
he hasn't used those dev cards in like 5 moves
one settlement and he wins, yeah
I’m last place a million miles forever anyway
